CAMPOUT.title: Camp Out
CAMPOUT.actions.watch.label: Take a Watch
CAMPOUT.actions.watch.details: You spend two hours on watch. You remain fully alert, making Wisdom (Perception) checks with no penalty and suffering no reduction to your passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.cook.label: Cook
CAMPOUT.actions.cook.summary: Feed the party for extra hit dice.
CAMPOUT.actions.cook.details: Using cooking utensils and a heat source, you prepare a meal. You and every willing creature that eats regain an additional hit die (up to their maximum). If you are proficient with cook's utensils they instead regain hit dice equal to your proficiency bonus, and gain 1d4 temporary hit points for each hit die that would exceed their maximum. You have disadvantage on Perception checks and −5 passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.craft.label: Craft
CAMPOUT.actions.craft.details: You make two hours of progress toward a crafting project. You need the appropriate tools, and a campfire or similar heat source for blacksmithing or alchemy. You have disadvantage on Perception checks and −5 passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.repair.label: Repair
CAMPOUT.actions.repair.details: A crafting action turned toward damaged equipment: two hours of progress repairing armour, weapons or gear with the appropriate tools. You have disadvantage on Perception checks and −5 passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.prepare.label: Prepare
CAMPOUT.actions.prepare.details: You ready yourself for the day ahead. Choose one ability score and gain a Preparation die, starting at a d6, which you may add to checks made with that ability. Each time you spend it the die steps down (d6 → d4 → d2) until it is depleted. You have disadvantage on Perception checks and −5 passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.task.label: Task
CAMPOUT.actions.task.details: You spend two hours on some other undertaking — copying spells, studying, or any activity the GM allows. You have disadvantage on Perception checks and −5 passive Perception.
CAMPOUT.actions.slumber.label: Slumber
CAMPOUT.actions.slumber.details: You sleep for the full eight hours and take no camp action. You automatically fail Perception checks, reduce your Exhaustion by 2 instead of 1, and gain 1 Inspiration.
CAMPOUT.settings.revealActions.name: Reveal Camp Actions
CAMPOUT.settings.revealActions.hint: Show every player what the rest of the party chose. Off by default, so choices stay hidden until the GM plays each watch out.
CAMPOUT.settings.requireSleep.name: Enforce Six Hours of Sleep
CAMPOUT.settings.requireSleep.hint: Warn the GM when a character has claimed too many watches to earn the benefit of a long rest. Trance characters are exempt.
CAMPOUT.settings.autoInspiration.name: Grant Inspiration for Slumber
CAMPOUT.settings.autoInspiration.hint: Automatically give Inspiration to characters who slumbered through the night.
CAMPOUT.settings.autoTranceRest.name: Automatic Trance Short Rest
CAMPOUT.settings.autoTranceRest.hint: Give elves, eladrin and warforged a short rest partway through the night, when their trance or inactive period ends.
CAMPOUT.settings.advanceWorldTime.name: Advance World Time
CAMPOUT.settings.advanceWorldTime.hint: Advance the world clock by two hours each time a watch is resolved.
CAMPOUT.errors.noActiveGM: No GM is logged in, so your camp choices cannot be saved.
CAMPOUT.errors.unknownAction: That camp action is not recognised.
CAMPOUT.errors.actionOnce: You can only take that camp action once per night.
CAMPOUT.errors.oneActionPerNight: You need six hours of sleep, which leaves time for a single camp action.
CAMPOUT.errors.tranceOneAction: Trance lets you take extra watches, but still only one other camp action.
CAMPOUT.errors.notEnoughSleep: That would leave you with less than six hours of sleep.
CAMPOUT.errors.gmOnly: Only a GM can do that.
CAMPOUT.errors.campActive: A camp is already under way.
CAMPOUT.errors.watchResolved: Watch {watch} has already been played out.
CAMPOUT.errors.badLink: That could not be linked to the watch.
CAMPOUT.errors.noPreparationDie: {name} has no Preparation die to spend.
CAMPOUT.notifications.campCancelled: Camp abandoned. No rest was granted.
CAMPOUT.notifications.playersNotified: Camp sheets opened for your players.
CAMPOUT.notifications.noTrance: Nobody in camp trances or rests inactively.
CAMPOUT.dialogs.underslept.title: Not Enough Sleep
CAMPOUT.dialogs.underslept.content:
These characters have claimed too many watches to earn a long rest: {names}.

Start the night anyway?
CAMPOUT.dialogs.cancel.title: Abandon Camp
CAMPOUT.dialogs.cancel.content: Discard this camp entirely? Nobody will receive a long rest.
CAMPOUT.dialogs.complete.title: Break Camp
CAMPOUT.dialogs.complete.content: Apply the long rest and every camp action benefit, then close the camp?
CAMPOUT.dialogs.prepare.title: Prepare
CAMPOUT.dialogs.prepare.content: Which ability score are you preparing?
CAMPOUT.dialogs.prepare.label: Ability
CAMPOUT.effects.preparation.name: Preparation Die ({die} {ability})
CAMPOUT.effects.preparation.description: Add {die} to an ability check made with {ability}. The die steps down each time it is spent.
CAMPOUT.summary.cook: Cooked for the camp, feeding {count} creature(s).
CAMPOUT.summary.hitDice: Regained {count} extra hit die/dice from the meal.
CAMPOUT.summary.tempHP: Gained {amount} temporary hit points from the meal.
CAMPOUT.summary.inspirationAlready: Slept soundly, but already had Inspiration.
CAMPOUT.summary.craft: Made two hours of crafting progress.
CAMPOUT.summary.repair: Made two hours of progress repairing gear.
CAMPOUT.summary.task: Made two hours of progress on a task.
CAMPOUT.chat.inviteBody: Claim your watches and choose what you do with your free time before the GM starts the night.
CAMPOUT.chat.nobodyAwake: Nobody stood watch. The camp is unguarded.
CAMPOUT.chat.tranceBody: {names} finish their trance early and take a short rest.
CAMPOUT.chat.noSystemAutomation: This world is not running dnd5e, so rest benefits were not applied automatically.
CAMPOUT.planner.title: Camp Out — Camp Planner
CAMPOUT.planner.phaseResolving: Playing out the night, watch by watch
CAMPOUT.planner.noCampHint: Start a long rest to hand your players their camp sheets.
CAMPOUT.planner.emptyState: Begin a long rest to lay out the night's four watches.
CAMPOUT.planner.hiddenHint: Players cannot see each other's choices until you play each watch out.
CAMPOUT.planner.watchesHint: Plan what happens on each watch. Notes stay whispered to you, and linked documents become one-click buttons when the watch resolves.
CAMPOUT.planner.encounterNotesPlaceholde: What happens, who notices, what the DC is…
CAMPOUT.planner.dropHint: Drop a Journal Entry, Roll Table, Macro or Actor here
CAMPOUT.planner.resolveLocked: Start the night on the Roster tab before playing out watches.
CAMPOUT.planner.completeEarlyHint: You can break camp before every watch has been played out.
CAMPOUT.sheet.title: Camp Out — My Night
CAMPOUT.sheet.noCharacter: You have no character in this camp. Ask your GM to add one.
CAMPOUT.sheet.rested: You will get a full six hours of sleep.
CAMPOUT.sheet.underslept: You have claimed too many watches for six hours of sleep.
CAMPOUT.sheet.lockedHint: The night has started — your plan is locked in.
CAMPOUT.sheet.notePlaceholder: What are you working on, and how do you describe it?
